zh.Markenfield Hall, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾馬爾金費爾德 霍爾
zh.Markingfield Hall, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾馬爾金費爾德 霍爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Markenfield於大約1380年出生在英國越可爾馬爾金費爾德 霍爾時，他的父親Thomas Markinfeld41歲，母親Joan Miniott26歲。他於1403年與Beatrice Sothill在英國越可爾利朋結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1415年在他的家鄉享年36歲，埋葬在英國越可爾利朋。

zh-hans.Markenfield Hall, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾馬爾金費爾德 霍爾
zh-hans.Markingfield Hall, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾馬爾金費爾德 霍爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Markenfield于大约1380年出生在英国越可爾馬爾金費爾德 霍爾时，他的父亲Thomas Markinfeld41岁，母亲Joan Miniott26岁。他于1403年与Beatrice Sothill在英国越可爾利朋结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1415年在他的家乡享年36岁，埋葬在英国越可爾利朋。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Markenfield was born about 1380, in Markingfield Hall, Yorkshire, England, his father, Thomas Markinfeld, was 41 and his mother, Joan Miniott, was 26. He married Beatrice Sothill in 1403, in Ripon, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He died in 1415, in his hometown, at the age of 36, and was buried in Ripon, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Markenfield est né environ 1380, à Markingfield Hall, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Markinfeld, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Joan Miniott, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Beatrice Sothill en 1403, à Ripon, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en 1415, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Ripon, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Markenfield um 1380 in Markingfield Hall, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Markinfeld 41 und seine Mutter Joan Miniott 26. Er hat 1403 in Ripon, Yorkshire, England Beatrice Sothill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1415 im Alter von 36 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Ripon, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Markenfield è nato il circa 1380 nel Markingfield Hall, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Markinfeld, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Joan Miniott, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Beatrice Sothill nel 1403, nel Ripon, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1415, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolto a Ripon, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Markenfield, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Markenfieldが約1380年にイギリスヨークシュアイアマーキングフィールド ハルで生まれた時，父Thomas Markinfeldは41歳，母Joan Miniottは26歳であった。1403年にイギリスヨークシュアイアリプオンでBeatrice Sothillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年に故郷で36歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアリプオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Markenfield(이)가 대략 1380년 영국 요르크실르 마킨그필드 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Markinfeld(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Miniott(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1403년 영국 요르크실르 리폰에서 Beatrice Sothill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년 그의 고향에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 리폰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Markenfield nasceu aproximadamente 1380, em Markingfield Hall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Markinfeld, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Joan Miniott, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrice Sothill em 1403, em Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1415, em sua cidade natal, com 36 anos, e foi sepultado em Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Markenfield родился около 1380 г. в местности маркингфиелд холл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Markinfeld было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Miniott, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice Sothill в 1403 г. в местности рипон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1415 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности рипон, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Markenfield nació aproximadamente 1380, en Markingfield Hall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Markinfeld, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Joan Miniott, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Beatrice Sothill en 1403, en Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1415, en su pueblo, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultado en Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
